message:
feat(fnp-python): native Rust std/var implementations + conformance harnesses

Ports np.std and np.var from Python passthrough to native Rust
UFuncArray::reduce_std and UFuncArray::reduce_var. Both support:
- axis (None or single integer)
- keepdims
- ddof (degrees of freedom adjustment)
Falls back to NumPy for dtype, out, where, mean, correction params.

Adds 200+ conformance test cases across 14 tests covering flat reduction,
2D/3D axis, keepdims, ddof variations, integer dtypes, and NaN handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
